_comment: Lunch spots Arnold scans on weekdays. Each spot has a 'strategy' (parser): menubot | menicka | generic | skip. The deterministic fetch-menus.py parses these into menus-today.txt; Arnold only reasons over that. Add spots here. Prefer 'menicka' (standard CZ daily-menu export) when a place is listed there.

spots.name: Nile House (next door)
spots.note: Teplý bufet = by weight (39 Kč/100g). Live cooking = fixed plates ~199 Kč. Soups ~39-49 Kč.

spots.name: Bufet Karlín
spots.note: Shoptet e-shop (pickup/delivery). Mostly burgers/fried — a treat spot, not cut-ideal.

spots.name: Karlín Osteria
spots.note: No daily menu published online (verified via browser: section empty, no API). À la carte Italian.

spots.name: Jidlovice Karlín
spots.note: JSON API, branch 2 = Karlín. Includes English names.

spots.name: Queens Kebab
spots.note: No daily menu — kebab/à la carte. Good high-protein fallback: order meat-heavy, easy on bread/fries.

spots.name: Holka Restaurant
spots.note: No daily-menu URL provided yet — add one to enable.
